title: Synthetic SaaS Data Processing Agreement review packet
disclaimer: This is an automated first-pass review packet generated from a checklist of deterministic rules. It is not legal advice, does not create a lawyer-client relationship, and must be reviewed by a qualified lawyer before any decision. All data in the bundled example is synthetic.

findings.title: Sub-processor flow-down of data-protection obligations
findings.detail: The DPA does not flow the same data-protection obligations down to sub-processors.
findings.remediation: Add a clause imposing materially equivalent obligations on every sub-processor (Art. 28(4)).

findings.title: Sub-processor transfer: Support Tools LLC (US)
findings.detail: Support Tools LLC processes data in US. Transfer to US has no valid Chapter V mechanism (no adequacy, SCCs, BCR, or Art. 49 derogation).
findings.remediation: Confirm the transfer mechanism covering Support Tools LLC in US.

findings.title: International transfer to US
findings.detail: Transfer to US has no valid Chapter V mechanism (no adequacy, SCCs, BCR, or Art. 49 derogation).
findings.remediation: Document a valid Art. 46 safeguard for US (or an Art. 49 derogation) and record the basis.

findings.title: Assistance with data-subject rights requests
findings.detail: Clause 'Assistance with data-subject rights requests' is present in the DPA.

findings.title: Assistance with security, breach, DPIA obligations
findings.detail: Clause 'Assistance with security, breach, DPIA obligations' is present in the DPA.

findings.title: Audit and inspection rights
findings.detail: Clause 'Audit and inspection rights' is present in the DPA.

findings.title: Confidentiality commitment for authorised persons
findings.detail: Clause 'Confidentiality commitment for authorised persons' is present in the DPA.

findings.title: Deletion or return of data on termination
findings.detail: Clause 'Deletion or return of data on termination' is present in the DPA.

findings.title: Processing only on documented instructions
findings.detail: Clause 'Processing only on documented instructions' is present in the DPA.

findings.title: Security of processing (technical & organisational measures)
findings.detail: Clause 'Security of processing (technical & organisational measures)' is present in the DPA.

findings.title: Personal-data breach notification to controller
findings.detail: Processor notifies controller; timing recorded as 'without undue delay'.

findings.title: Sub-processor authorisation
findings.detail: Sub-processor authorisation is 'general'.

findings.title: Processing description: categories of personal data
findings.detail: Categories of personal data are listed: account data, usage logs, support correspondence.

findings.title: Processing description: duration of the processing
findings.detail: The DPA specifies the duration of the processing.

findings.title: Processing description: nature and purpose of the processing
findings.detail: The DPA specifies the nature and purpose of the processing.

findings.title: Processing description: subject matter of the processing
findings.detail: The DPA specifies the subject matter of the processing.

findings.title: CCPA/CPRA service-provider terms
findings.detail: Service-provider / contractor terms restricting sale and retention are present.

findings.title: International transfer to JP
findings.detail: JP benefits from an adequacy decision (Art. 45).

findings.title: Sub-processor transfer: Analytics KK (JP)
findings.detail: Analytics KK processes data in JP. JP benefits from an adequacy decision (Art. 45).

findings.title: International transfer to FR
findings.detail: FR is within the EEA; no Chapter V transfer mechanism required.
